title: The Role of Exosome-miRNA as Biomarkers of Alzheimer's Disease: A Systematic Review of Case-Control and Longitudinal Studies.
snippet: Alzheimer's disease (AD) is a progressive neurodegenerative disorder, and its diagnosis emains challenging. Exosomal microRNAs (miRNAs), due to their stability, tissue specificity, and ability to cross the blood-brain barrier, show significant promise as ideal biomarkers for AD. The present study aimed to systematically elucidate the relationship between th...
